title: CVE-2026-4519 - webbrowser.open() allows leading dashes in URLs

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-4519 - webbrowser.open() allows leading dashes in U
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/23
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*webbrowser.open*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
